Klasse PlayerEntity

java.lang.Object
players.PlayerEntity
Bekannte direkte Unterklassen:
CPUPlayer, ImaginativePlayer, Player
public abstract class PlayerEntity extends Object
This class represents the abstract base class for different players. It provides a common structure for all players in the game.

  • Felddetails

    • name

      protected String name

    • stones

      protected List<Stone> stones

    • currentPhase

      protected GamePhase currentPhase

    • placedStones

      protected int placedStones

  • Konstruktordetails

    • PlayerEntity

      protected PlayerEntity(String name)
      Constructs a player with the given name. Initializes an empty list for its stones. Sets the phase, always starting with the setting phase.
      Parameter:
      name - The name of the player.

  • Methodendetails

    • addStone

      public void addStone(Stone stone)
      Adds a stone to the players stone list.
      Parameter:
      stone - The stone that gets added to the list.

    • removeStone

      public void removeStone(Stone stone)
      Removes a stone from the player.
      Parameter:
      stone - The stone that should get removed.

    • stonePlaced

      public void stonePlaced()
      Counts how many stones of the player have already been placed.

    • allStonesPlaced

      public boolean allStonesPlaced()
      Checks if all the stones of the player have been placed already.
      Gibt zurück:
      true if all stones have been placed, false otherwise.

    • getRemainingStones

      public List<Stone> getRemainingStones()
      Getter for the list containing all the players remaining stones.
      Gibt zurück:
      List containing all remaining stones.

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Getter for the players name.
      Gibt zurück:
      name of the player.

    • getPhase

      public GamePhase getPhase()
      Getter for the current phase the player is in.
      Gibt zurück:
      Current phase the player is in.

    • getPlacedStones

      public int getPlacedStones()
      Getter for the number of stones that have been placed by the player.
      Gibt zurück:
      The number of placed stones.

    • setPhase

      public void setPhase(GamePhase phase)
      Changes the current phase to a new one.
      Parameter:
      phase - The new phase that should be changed to.

    • setPlacedStones

      public void setPlacedStones(int placedStones)
      Sets the number of placed stones for the player.
      Parameter:
      placedStones - The number of stones that have been placed by the player.
